description: This file is a shell script designed to perform an end-to-end smoke test for an orchestration API. It creates a document, attaches extracted text, triggers a run-all orchestration, polls the build status until completion, and fetches the orchestration details. It tests the connectivity and functionality of the backend API endpoints related to documents, orchestration run, and build status.

methods.name: have_jq
methods.description: Checks if the 'jq' command-line JSON processor is available.

methods.name: require_cmd
methods.description: Ensures a required command is available; exits if not found.

methods.name: c
methods.description: Wrapper function around 'curl' with default headers for the test.

methods.name: json_get
methods.description: Parses JSON content using 'jq' or a fallback to extract specific fields.
